---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: "Research | Md. Jubayer Hossain"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*.qmd"
    template: ../ejs/article.ejs
    categories: true
    sort:
      - "year desc"
      - "title"
    sort-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
    filter-ui: [title,author,publication,year]
    page-size: 10
    field-display-names: 
      publication: "Publication"
      year: "Year"
---

:::{#articles}
:::
